title: Skövde, Västra Götaland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Skövde, Västra Götaland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Skövde is a city in Västra Götaland with a population of 56,000. A city in the heart of Sweden’s agricultural region, known for its game development industry and lake Billingen.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
